editableNewDialogue.text: Can you compress a short code summary into a single line with no punctuation
Improved code prompts for escape code allows update or restore from backup loops until exit
Now rewrite that as a tiny pseudocode block

input escape_code
backup empty
loop
  ask U update or R restore else quit
  if U backup escape_code then maybe change escape_code
  if R escape_code equals backup
end
Unrelated quick check what does HTTP 204 mean
HTTP 204 means No Content request succeeded but server returns no body often used after delete or update
Another unrelated one why do some lighthouses flash in patterns
Flash patterns identify lighthouse each has a unique sequence so sailors can recognize location even at night
Last one what is the smallest prime bigger than 100
Same style as before but make output fit on one phone screen because reading on commute
Got it I will keep it ultra short and screen friendly
Different task now keep normal sentences and punctuation No bullet points no extreme shortening
Got it I will write in normal sentences with punctuation and avoid bullet points or forced shortening
Yeah those no determiners and no punctuation constraints were just for that one exercise not a general preference
Understood those constraints were situational for that exercise and not a standing formatting preference

editableUpdatedMemories.label: Preferences/Interaction_Preferences
editableUpdatedMemories.reasoning: Old memory inferred a long term preference for extremely concise bullet pointed summaries with minimal punctuation and determiners. User explicitly states those constraints were only for a single exercise and not a general preference so the stable preference should be updated to reflect normal formatting by default.
editableUpdatedMemories.value: Formatting constraints like no determiners or no punctuation were situational for a specific exercise not a general long term preference; user may prefer normal sentences with punctuation unless otherwise requested
